creator: roam@orbitel.bg
text:
On Wed, Jun 13, 2001 at 08:22:14AM -0700, no working version of netscape navigator wrote:
> 
> >Number:         28124
> >Category:       ports

> >Organization:
> TU Muenchen
> >Environment:
> FreeBSD atrbg11.informatik.tu-muenchen.de 4.3-STABLE FreeBSD 4.3-STABLE #4: Wed Jun 13 13:31:42 CEST 2001     root@atrbg11.informatik.tu-muenchen.de:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/ATRBG11  i386
> >Description:
> netscape-4.08 and 4.76 are marked as broken, but there is no
> 4.77 for *BSD. Maybe there should be any netscape-4 version
> that is hopefully not broken.

Bring this up with Netscape Communications - it's them who have to release
a 4.78 for FreeBSD - arguably, no one else has the sources to do so :)


G'luck,
Peter
